title: A method for the process of collagen modified polyester from fish scales waste
author: Hou, Huang, et al.

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: The methods to extract collagen peptides from fish skins and scales have been investigated [6,7,12] Fig. 1. Illustrates the process of producing collagen peptide from fish scales [13].Fig. 1The process of Collagen peptide from fish scales.Fig 1

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: Step 1 (Washing): Wash fish scales with purified water.

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: Step 2 (Drying): Dry fish scales with cooling fans.

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: Step 3 (Freeze-drying): Send fish scales into a cold dried chamber. Quick freeze under vacuum conditions.

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: Step 4 (Smashing): Micronize fish scales by mechanical crusher

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: Step 5 (Enzyme treatment): Add enzyme to the finely crushed fish scale material, and perform enzyme treatment under warm water.

steps.title: The extraction process of collagen peptide from fish scales
steps.instruction: Step 6 (Filter): After centrifugal filtration of the hydrolyzed liquid, it is dried into a powder.
